robot_prompt.c: Excuse me, do you have any rubbish you'd like to throw away?
robot_prompt.d: Hi there! Could I take any waste off your hands?
robot_prompt.a: Hello! Do you have any rubbish you need to throw away?
robot_prompt.b: Hi! Would you like to dispose of any waste?

robot_leave.c: No problem at all! Have a lovely day. Goodbye!
robot_leave.d: That's alright. I'll be on my way. Take care!
robot_leave.a: Alright, no worries. Have a great day!
robot_leave.b: Okay! I will leave you to it. Goodbye!

robot_proceed.c: Okay! Here is the bin. Please put the rubbish on the top of the bin.
robot_proceed.d: Of course! I will hold the bin open for you. Please put the rubbish on the top of the bin.
robot_proceed.a: Got it! Here is the bin. Please put the rubbish on the top of the bin.
robot_proceed.b: No problem! I will hold the rubbish bin for you. Please put the rubbish on the top of the bin.

robot_repeat.a: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Do you have any rubbish to throw away?
robot_repeat.b: Pardon? Could you please tell me if you have any waste to dispose of?
robot_repeat.c: I'm sorry, I didn't understand. Do you need to throw anything away?
robot_repeat.d: Could you say that again? I just want to know if you have any rubbish for me.
